data.title: New Jersey Resources Non-GAAP EPS of $0.16 misses by $0.03, revenue of $336.08M beats by $36.33M
data.description:
• New Jersey Resources press release (NJR): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.16 misses by $0.03.
  • Revenue of $336.08M (-15.1% Y/Y) beats by $36.33M.

  • Fiscal 2026 Outlook

  • Maintains 7 to 9 percent long-term net financial earnings per share (NFEPS) growth target, starting from a fiscal 2025 base of $2.83 per share

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Nvidia sees FQ4 revenue above estimates after solid FQ3 print
Hillenbrand Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.83, revenue of $652M
data.description:
• Hillenbrand press release (HI): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.83.
  • Revenue of $652M.
  • FY 2025 net revenue of $2.67 billion decreased 16% vs. prior year; pro forma net revenue decreased 9%
  • FY 2025 GAAP EPS of $0.61 increased from $(3.03) in the prior year; adjusted EPS of $2.49 decreased 25%

data.title: Coinbase said to launch Kalshi-powered prediction market
data.description:
Coinbase Global (COIN) is set to roll out a Kalshi (KALSHI)-powered prediction marketplace to let its customers bet on various events, sports and elections, according to a media report on Wednesday.

The crypto giant plans to unveil details about the new prediction market and additional offerings during an event on Dec. 17, The Information reported, citing one of two people familiar with the matter. Prediction market Kalshi (KALSHI) reportedly allows users to deposit Circle Internet Group's (CRCL) USDC (USDC-USD) stablecoin and relies on Coinbase (COIN) to hold those tokens in custody.

The trading platform's entry into prediction markets comes amid growing interest in the space. Retail trading app Robinhood Markets (HOOD) has already launched a prediction market, and derivatives exchange Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) was said to be rolling one out soon.

Coinbase did not immediately respond to Seeking Alpha's request for comment.

data.title: Vizsla Silver announces proposed offering of $250M
data.description:
• Vizsla Silver (NYSE:VZLA) announced  on Wednesday an offering of $250M convertible senior unsecured notes due 2031.
  • The company expects to grant the initial purchasers an additional $50M amount of notes for a period of 13 days, beginning on and including the date on which the notes are first issued.
  • The company intends to use the net proceeds  to support the exploration and development of the Panuco Project, potential future acquisitions, and for general corporate purposes.
  •  Furthermore, the company plans to pay the purchase price for the capped call transactions with a portion of the net proceeds from the offering or from existing cash on hand. 
  • The notes will mature on January 15, 2031, unless earlier converted, redeemed, or repurchased. 
  • In connection with the offering, the company expects to enter into privately negotiated cash-settled capped call transactions with one or more of the initial purchasers of the notes, their respective affiliates, and other financial institutions.
  • The capped call transactions are expected generally to compensate for potential economic dilution upon conversion of the notes.

data.title: Nano Dimension GAAP EPS of -$0.13, revenue of $26.9M
data.description:
• Nano Dimension press release (NNDM): Q3 GAAP EPS of -$0.13.
  • Revenue of $26.9M (+80.5% Y/Y).

  • Year-to-date 2025 Results:

    • Revenue: $67.1 million, a 55.4% increase from $43.2 million year-over-year
    • Gross Margin (“GM”): 31.3%, down from 46.5% year-over-year
    • Adjusted Gross Margin (“Adjusted GM”): 45.5%, down from 48.4% year-over-year
    • Adjusted EBITDA loss: $43.3 million, from a loss of $44.7 million year-over-year
    • Net Loss from Continuing Operations: $66.4 million, down from a loss of $90.5 million year-over-year

    • For the fourth quarter of 2025, the Company anticipates revenue in the range of $31.5 million to $33.5 million, non-GAAP gross margin of 47% to 48.5%, non-GAAP operating expenses of $28 million to $29 million, and Adjusted EBITDA loss in the range of $12 million to $14 million.
